problem: Why does acute pain become chronic in some people — what neural change occurs?
mechanism: CRISPR gene editing targeting specific pathway
hypothesis: The key to Why does acute pain become chronic in some people — what neural change occurs? is CRISPR gene editing targeting specific pathway — specifically CRISPR gene editing — which would help 50,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Mouse model knockout study with 34 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
